evals.prompt: Give me keywords for 'home decor bedroom on a budget'.
expect: all volume figures are ranges labeled [estimated, unverified]
output includes a note directing independent verification
keyword cluster has primary, secondary, and long-tail tiers

evals.prompt: SEO strategy for 'thrift flip DIY' including competitor analysis.
expect: if retrieval fails, gap-record emitted with the missing platform noted

evals.prompt: SEO keywords and title options for home decor living room reveal.
expect: title skeleton is labeled as a draft for further polish
primary keyword appears in the first 60 characters of each title option
title_skeleton is not presented as a finished, ready-to-publish title
